title: centaurea phrygia subsp. nigriceps
intro: Centaurea phrygia subsp. nigriceps is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, also known as the knapweed or centaury. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Centaurea phrygia subsp. nigriceps include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
